title: Better Plantations
body:

--- ![About](https://i.ibb.co/6JmH2sZm/about.png) This datapack only improves your plantations, **the things that improve: Automatically Replant, mechanics inspired by RightClickHarvest, break the plantation into 5x5.** And that was the content of the datapack that our **developer: uSlib,** Created ---
How Datapack Works
